items.title: Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption
items.summary: Chain of Thought is our new expert-hosted webinar series, taking you behind the scenes of real investigations, emerging typologies and… The post Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption appeared first on Chainalysis.

items.title: Singapore's Hyperliquid warning, Indonesia's FinFluencer license: Asia Express
items.summary: Hyperliquid follows Bybit onto Singapore's "naughty" list, Indonesia's new scheme to certify social media influencers promoting crypto: Asia Express.

items.title: Bitcoin lending is entering a new institutional era, according to Silicon Valley Bank
items.summary: The bank said bitcoin lending has emerged from the 2022 crypto credit collapse with stronger risk controls, growing institutional participation and a path toward lower borrowing costs.

items.title: BlackRock pushes deeper into DeFi with Ethena integration, sending ENA up 8%
items.summary: The deal adds Ethena's yield-generating token to BlackRock's risk management platform and create a $100 million liquidity facility for BlackRock's tokenized money market fund.

items.title: Can AI drain DeFi? Separating Claude Mythos hype from reality
items.summary: Claude Mythos has raised concerns about AI-driven attacks on DeFi protocols. However, the same AI tools are also available to security teams, not just attackers.

items.title: Prediction-market operational consolidation could spur M&A wave: Bernstein
items.summary: Bernstein says platforms are bringing exchange, clearing and brokerage infrastructure in-house, setting up potential deals while increasing antitrust and regulatory risks.

items.title: Galaxy cuts CLARITY Act odds to 50% as Senate floor time narrows
items.summary: Galaxy cut its 2026 CLARITY Act odds to 50%, warning that Senate floor time is running out before the August recess.

items.title: Excessive AI spending risks global financial consequences, BIS warns
items.summary: The AI investment surge is a potential flashpoint for systemic risk, “as financing has relied on enormous debt and highly leveraged nonbank structures that can rapidly unwind,” one analyst said in response to the report.

items.title: Bitcoin's 52-week correlation with USD/JPY hits -0.90, undercutting 'carry trade' theory
items.summary: Bitcoin’s price has shown an unusually strong negative 52-week correlation with the dollar-yen exchange rate.

items.title: Live updates: BlackRock's IBIT sheds $300 million as bitcoin demand dwindles
items.summary: IBIT alone shed $300 million while smaller funds absorbed some of the outflow. The selloff lands as the same AI trade that crashed Korea a week ago now powers a record quarterly rally there.

items.title: Dubai set for crypto firm influx as MiCA deadline pushes companies to reassess Europe
items.summary: Dubai lawyer Irina Heaver says European founders are flocking to the UAE for faster licensing, a dedicated crypto regulator and access to markets beyond Europe.

items.title: XRP holds $1 support as network activity rises and leverage clears out
items.summary: Active addresses jumped 72% in two weeks while open interest fell to its lowest level since July 2025, giving traders a cleaner setup even as price remains trapped below resistance.

items.title: Ether, solana and dogecoin slide as Strategy's bitcoin sales plan pressures market
items.summary: Bitcoin held below $60,000 as a surging dollar kept crypto pinned. Onchain demand stayed quiet through the week's losses, and Strategy's plan to possibly sell bitcoin added to the caution.

items.title: Tether trades at 7% to 10% premium in India. Exchanges say it's just supply and demand
items.summary: Executives at major platforms CoinDCX and CoinSwitch say the premium reflects a demand-supply imbalance and thin local liquidity.

items.title: Bitcoin under pressure below $60,000 as Japanese yen hits 40-year low against the U.S. dollar
items.summary: BTC fell in Asia as the Japanese yen tanked to four-decade lows, lifting the dollar higher across the board.

items.title: Australia’s crypto travel rule is coming into effect: Here’s what's changing
items.summary: From July, crypto exchanges operating in Australia will prompt for additional information on all outgoing and incoming transfers.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK adds $43.5M in crypto stocks amid market dip
items.summary: ARK Invest's biggest crypto stock purchases over the past three trading days were Coinbase and Circle, whose shares have fallen 17% and 27.6%, respectively, over the past month.

items.title: Bitmine lifts Ether holdings to 5.7M as it joins Russell 1000
items.summary: Bitmine purchased about $43 million worth of Ether last week as it entered the Russell 1000 Index, bringing it closer to its goal of owning 5% of ETH’s supply.

items.title: Sovereign funds see Bitcoin discount as entry point: MidChains CEO
items.summary: It sends “a very clear signal” to other institutions that may be sitting on the sidelines and looking at these larger funds as leaders, said MidChains CEO Basil Al Askari.
